question.label: Shipping hesitation
question.name: What usually makes you pause before shipping?
question.description: Distinguishes confidence, tooling, and process reasons behind late reassurance-seeking.

answer: When feedback is specific and fast, I move much quicker.

assessment.note: Names a specific missing condition — fast, specific feedback — implying current hesitation is driven by low confidence and unclear expectations around shipping.

history.answer_excerpt: I can do the tasks, but I still second-guess whether my approach matches team expectations.
When feedback is specific and fast, I move much quicker.
